ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a Cypher query?'})-[r1:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer),
    p2 = (q)-[r2:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'Cypher'}),
    p3 = (a)-[r3:PROVIDED]->(u:User {display_name: 'Neo4j Expert'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How have users like Neo4j Expert structured their answers to the question "How to build a Cypher query?" and what specific tags, like "Cypher," commonly accompany those responses?

cypher: MATCH (u:User {display_name: "Neo4j Expert"})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question {title: "How to build a Cypher query?"})\nMATCH (q)<-[:ANSWERED]-(a:Answer)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag)\nRETURN u.display_name AS user, q.title AS question, t.name AS tag
